name: Surf n Sea
tagline: The oldest surf shop in Hawaii (1965) — real surfers sell and rent gear in a colorful Haleiwa waterfront landmark.
parking: Small lot; street parking on Kamehameha Hwy
bestTime: Morning for the best advice on where to surf that day; check the used board section in back
talkStory: The oldest surf shop in Hawaii (since 1965), located right on the Haleiwa waterfront in a colorful wooden building. This is not a tourist trap — it's a working surf shop where North Shore locals buy and rent gear. The staff are real surfers who can tell you where the best waves are breaking that day. The used board section in the back has great deals. The building itself is a North Shore landmark worth photographing.
